title: podman tag command creates duplicate <none> image entries
body:
### Issue Description

If I have an image with the tag `quay.io/nivologd/httpd-24:latest`, and I use the `podman tag` command to assign the exact same tag to an untagged image, the original image with that tag disappears.


### Steps to reproduce the issue

1.  Have an image with the tag `quay.io/nivologd/httpd-24:latest`.
2.  Have an untagged image.
3. Use the `podman tag` command to assign the existing tag to the untagged image. For example: `podman tag <image_id_of_untagged_image> quay.io/nivologd/httpd-24:latest`.


### Describe the results you received

Both the original image and the untagged image have the <none> tag.

### Describe the results you expected

Podman prevents using the same tag for two images.

comments.body:
> Both the original image and the untagged image have the tag.

That doesn't seem to be true? The tag is only on the newly tagged image while the old one gets it tagged removed which is the expected behavior, are you seeing something else?  Please provide exact commands used and their output, i.e. this is what I see
```
$ podman images
REPOSITORY                             TAG         IMAGE ID      CREATED        SIZE
<none>                                 <none>      762545103d31  5 seconds ago  1.19 kB
ghcr.io/home-assistant/home-assistant  stable      f34e1b7552d2  4 days ago     2.15 GB
quay.io/libpod/testimage               20241011    b82e560ed57b  11 months ago  12.2 MB
$ podman tag 762545103d31 ghcr.io/home-assistant/home-assistant:stable 
$ podman images
REPOSITORY                             TAG         IMAGE ID      CREATED         SIZE
ghcr.io/home-assistant/home-assistant  stable      762545103d31  24 seconds ago  1.19 kB
<none>                                 <none>      f34e1b7552d2  4 days ago      2.15 GB
quay.io/libpod/testimage               20241011    b82e560ed57b  11 months ago   12.2 MB
```

A reviewer has determined we need more information to understand the reported issue.  A comment on what is missing should be provided. Be certain you:

* provide an exact reproducer where possible
* verify you have provided all relevant information - minimum is `podman info`
* answer any follow up questions

If no response to the `needs-info` is provided in 30 days, this issue may be closed by our stale bot.

For more information on reporting issues on this repository, consult our [issue guide](ISSUE.md).
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
